programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Cyborg Cop 2 is the special kind of terrible movie that has failed before you're even done reading the title. That's right folks, Cyborg Cop 2 does not even manage to contain a single cyborg cop. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of Mystery Science Theater 3000).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic live riffing treatment to this classic horror shocker starring Vincent Price! A millionaire offers $10,000 to a group of strangers to spend the night in The House On Haunted Hill. Join Mike, Kevin, Bill, and Paul F. Tompkins for an unforgetttable night in RiffTrax Live The House On Haunted Hill.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about how to communicate clearly. Join Bridget and Mary Jo for Speak Up, Andrew!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of MST3K bring their comedic riffing treatment to the cheesy family film A Talking Cat. So grab your cheese puffs and join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for this insane riff of A Talking Cat!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The Little Unicorn is a tale of whimsy, fantasy, and extremely generous definitions of the word “little.” This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of Mystery Science Theater 3000).

programme.title: Side Effects
programme.desc: SIDE EFFECTS is a provocative thriller about Emily and Martin (Rooney Mara and Channing Tatum), a successful New York couple whose world unravels when a new drug prescribed by Emily's psychiatrist (Jude Law) – intended to treat anxiety – has unexpected side effects.

programme.title: The Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: When a new global ice-age threatens the world, a climatologist tries to figure out a way to save humanity, and attempts to get to his young son in New York.

programme.title: Gone Girl
programme.desc: Ben Affleck and Rosamund Pike head an all-star cast in this thriller based on Gillian Flynn's bestseller about a man suspected of wrongdoing when his wife goes missing.

programme.title: Zombieland (2009)
programme.desc: Nerdy college student Columbus (Jessie Eisenberg) has and gun-toting, Twinkie-loving Tallahassee (Woody Harrelson) are about to stare down their most horrifying challenge yet: each other's company. Emma Stone and Abigail Breslin co-star in this double-hitting, head-smashing comedy.

programme.title: Hitch (2005)
programme.desc: New York "date doctor" Alex Hitchens (Will Smith) tries to charm gossip columnist Sara Melas (Eva Mendes) at the same time he is coaching shy Albert (Kevin James) on how to win the love of beautiful heiress Allegra Cole (Amber Valletta).

programme.title: Side Effects
programme.desc: SIDE EFFECTS is a provocative thriller about Emily and Martin (Rooney Mara and Channing Tatum), a successful New York couple whose world unravels when a new drug prescribed by Emily's psychiatrist (Jude Law) – intended to treat anxiety – has unexpected side effects.

programme.title: The Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: When a new global ice-age threatens the world, a climatologist tries to figure out a way to save humanity, and attempts to get to his young son in New York.

programme.title: Gone Girl
programme.desc: Ben Affleck and Rosamund Pike head an all-star cast in this thriller based on Gillian Flynn's bestseller about a man suspected of wrongdoing when his wife goes missing.

programme.title: The Protector
programme.desc: Written and directed by James Glickenhaus (The Exterminator), The Protector stars Jackie Chan and Danny Aiello (Do the Right Thing) as a pair of NYPD cops sent to Hong Kong to catch a drug lord who has kidnapped the daughter of his former associate. Also starring martial-arts star Moon Lee (Angel Force) and Roy Chiao (Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom), this thriller features Hollywood-style action sprinkled with Chan's death-defying stunts.

programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: Sandra Bullock and Melissa McCarthy play incompatible cops who team up to bring down a drug lord in this outrageously funny comedy from the director of Bridesmaids, Paul Feig.

programme.title: The Gunman
programme.desc: Sean Penn stars as Jim Terrier, an ex-special forces government contractor who is betrayed by the organization he once worked for and must go on the run in a relentless game of cat and mouse across Africa and Europe.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A symbologist is caught in a 2000-year-old web of secrecy and uncovers the truth about The Holy Grail -- a truth that could shatter the very foundations of Western Civilization.

programme.title: Fever Pitch
programme.desc: Drew Barrymore and Jimmy Fallon co-star in this romantic comedy about a woman who meets the perfect guy, only to discover she has to compete with his first true love: the Boston Red Sox.

programme.title: Country Crush
programme.desc: Nancy is an aspiring singer struggling to launch her country music career and navigate a relationship with an opportunistic music producer. While on a trip away from the city, her car breaks down and a good-hearted, handsome stranger named Charlie shows up with a tow. Sparks fly between the two.

programme.title: La La Land
programme.desc: Winner of 6 Academy Awards® including Best Director for writer/director Damien Chazelle, and winner of a record-breaking 7 Golden Globe® Awards, LA LA LAND is more than the most acclaimed movie of the year — it's a cinematic treasure for the ages that you'll fall in love with again and again. Emma Stone and Ryan Gosling star as Mia and Sebastian, an actress and a jazz musician pursuing their Hollywood dreams — and finding each other — in a vibrant celebration of hope, dreams, and love.

programme.title: About Last Night (2014)
programme.desc: A hilarious romp through the minefields from the bar to the bedroom in this romantic comedy about hookups, breakups…and breakdowns.

programme.title: Love on a Limb
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. When the town's Oak tree is set to be cut down, Aimee tries to save it.

programme.title: Love Struck Cafe
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Megan is tasked with turning her beloved hometown into a commercialized area.

programme.title: Lead with Your Heart
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Two teens hatch a plot to make their parents realize they still love each other.

programme.title: The Good Witch's Gift
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. Cassie is surprised when Jake proposes their wedding date for Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. Abigail, jealous of Cassie's attention, decides to sell "special" chocolates.

programme.title: Bad Romance: The Vicky White Story
programme.desc: Corrections officer Vicky White develops a secret infatuation with new prisoner Casey White. With his inevitable transfer looming, Vicky risks everything to break Casey out of jail, leading authorities on a nationwide manhunt.

programme.title: My Life Is a Lifetime Movie: Lovely Little Liars
programme.desc: A high school history teacher is involved in a sex scandal with one of her students a woman's whirlwind romance with a Cuban spy.

programme.title: Secrets of a Marine's Wife
programme.desc: Friends, family and local law enforcement investigate the mysterious disappearance of Erin Corwin, a young pregnant woman married to U.S. Marine Jon Corwin.

programme.title: Jodi Arias: Dirty Little Secret
programme.desc: Jodi Arias (Tania Raymonde) claims self-defense while on trial for the murder of her ex-boyfriend, Travis Alexander (Jesse Lee Soffer).

programme.title: Bad Romance: The Vicky White Story
programme.desc: Corrections officer Vicky White develops a secret infatuation with new prisoner Casey White. With his inevitable transfer looming, Vicky risks everything to break Casey out of jail, leading authorities on a nationwide manhunt.

programme.title: The Sisters Brothers
programme.desc: It's 1851, and Charlie and Eli Sisters are both brothers and assassins, boys grown to men in a savage and hostile world. The Sisters brothers find themselves on a journey through the Northwest, bringing them to the mountains of Oregon, a dangerous brothel in the small town of Mayfield, and eventually, the gold rush land of California -- an adventure that tests the deadly family ties that bind.

programme.title: The Way of the Gun
programme.desc: They make no excuses. They don't ask forgiveness. Their story is without compromise, brutal and simple. For contemporary desperados Parker and associate Longbaugh, crime means survival at any cost. Their impromptu plan to kidnap surrogate mother Robin, just weeks from delivering the son of Hale and Francesca Chidduck, seems to be a fast way to cash in on a fat ransom and head for the border. But their haste does indeed make waste.

programme.title: Wind River
programme.desc: Cory Lambert is a wildlife officer who finds the body of an 18-year-old woman on an American Indian reservation in snowy Wyoming. When the autopsy reveals that she was raped, FBI agent Jane Banner arrives to investigate. Teaming up with Lambert as a guide, the duo soon find that their lives are in danger while trying to solve the mystery of the teen's death.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: Outlaw Ben Wade (Russell Crowe) terrorizes 1800s Arizona, especially the Southern Railroad, until he is finally captured. Wade must be brought to trial, so Dan Evans (Christian Bale), the owner of a drought-stricken ranch, volunteers to escort him to the train. Along the trail, a grudging respect forms between the men, but danger looms at every turn, and the criminal's men are in pursuit.

programme.title: The Brothers Grimm
programme.desc: In this visionary film, Will and Jake Grimm dazzle small towns with their imaginative folklore and elaborate illusions, only to discover many of the fantastic characters, and thrilling situations, found in their beloved fairy tales are real.

programme.title: Cloverfield
programme.desc: Five young New Yorkers face a life or death struggle in order to escape from the city when a monster the size of a skyscraper suddenly appears.

programme.title: Super 8
programme.desc: In the summer of 1979, a group of friends in a small Ohio town witness a catastrophic train crash while making a Super 8 movie and soon suspect that it was not an accident.

programme.title: Project Almanac
programme.desc: When five teens discover a machine that can send them back in time, the possibilities seem endless. But by changing the past, they have threatened the future of our world. Can they undo the damage they have unleashed before it's too late?

programme.title: The Godfather, Part III
programme.desc: As Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) ages, he finds that being the head of the Corleone crime family isn't getting any easier. He wants his family out of the Mafia, but the mob kingpin (Eli Wallach) isn't eager to let one of the most powerful and wealthy families go legit. Making matters even worse is Michael's nephew, Vincent (Andy Garcia). Not only does Vincent want a piece of the Corleone family's criminal empire, but he also wants Michael's daughter, Mary (Sofia Coppola).

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: Widely regarded as one of the greatest films of all time, this mob drama, based on Mario Puzo's novel of the same name, focuses on the powerful Italian-American crime family of Don Vito Corleone (Marlon Brando). When the don's youngest son, Michael (Al Pacino), reluctantly joins the Mafia, he becomes involved in the inevitable cycle of violence and betrayal. Although Michael tries to maintain a normal relationship with his wife, Kay (Diane Keaton), he is drawn deeper into the family business.

programme.title: The Godfather, Part II
programme.desc: The compelling sequel to "The Godfather," contrasting the life of Corleone father and son. Traces the problems of Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) in 1958 and that of a young immigrant Vito Corleone (Robert De Niro) in 1917's Hell's Kitchen. Michael survives many misfortunes and Vito is introduced to a life of crime.

programme.title: Passionada
programme.desc: Celia Amonte (Sofia Milos) is a lonely widow and single mother with a rambunctious teen daughter, Vicky (Emmy Rossum). Her circumstances may change, thanks to the arrival of a sleek British gambler named Charlie Beck (Jason Isaacs). Though Charlie and Celia spark an instant attraction, the still mourning Celia is cautious to get involved with him. Vicky, on the other hand, is eager to teach Charlie how to romance her mother -- in exchange for gambling lessons.

programme.title: Nothing in Common
programme.desc: A successful advertising executive, David Basner (Tom Hanks), is working on a project that could make him partner at his company. When his parents suddenly end their 36-year marriage, he is thrown into the role of caregiver, dealing with his delicate mother, Lorraine (Eva Marie Saint), and his combative father, Max (Jackie Gleason), who provides constant aggravation and bitter remarks. When one of his parents gets sick, David must choose what is more important, his family or his career.

programme.title: The Da Vinci Code
programme.desc: A murder in Paris' Louvre Museum and cryptic clues in some of Leonardo da Vinci's most famous paintings lead to the discovery of a religious mystery. For 2,000 years a secret society closely guards information that -- should it come to light -- could rock the very foundations of Christianity.

programme.title: The Legend of Zorro
programme.desc: A secret society, the Knights of Aragon, seeks to keep the United States from achieving manifest destiny -- and only the legendary Zorro (Antonio Banderas) can stop them. Unfortunately, Zorro, also known as Don Alejandro de la Vega, has problems of his own: His wife, Elena (Catherine Zeta-Jones), is divorcing him for spending too much time pursuing heroics and not enough being a father to their young son. But it isn't long before the whole family gets caught up in stopping the Knights.

programme.title: You Belong To Me
programme.desc: A doctor who has trouble at home in the form of a jealous husband. He doesn't like that she has male patients.

programme.title: The Wackiest Ship In The Army
programme.desc: During WW II, Lt. Crandall commands an inexperienced ship to deliver an Australian observer to a held island.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds Goes To Town
programme.desc: A millionare is declared insane when he announces that he'll give his fortune away to America's poor.

programme.title: From Here To Eternity
programme.desc: A torrid look at military life just prior to the bombing of Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: Gambit
programme.desc: Harry Deane (Colin Firth) is a man with a plan. Art Curator for media tycoon, Lord Lionel Shabandar (Alan Rickman), Harry devises an elaborate plot to con his abusive boss into purchasing a fake Monet painting.

programme.title: The Time Machine
programme.desc: Hoping to alter the events of the past, a 19th-century inventor instead travels 800,000 years into the future, where he finds humankind divided into two warring races.

programme.title: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Air, Water, Earth, Fire. Four nations tied by destiny when Fire launches war against the others. Caught between the war, one Avatar discovers he's able to manipulate all four elements.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Two thrill-seeking adventurers cross paths with a beautiful doctor and they find themselves on the ultimate hunt for a treasure that claims all who seek it.

programme.title: Assault on Precinct 13
programme.desc: While en route to prison, a bus carrying criminals Marion (Laurence Fishburne), Beck (John Leguizamo) and Anna (Aisha Hinds) is rerouted to Detroit's soon-to-be-closed Precinct 13 because of a dangerous winter storm. All communications with the outside world are cut off, and Jake (Ethan Hawke), an emotionally volatile police sergeant who is haunted by his past, is forced to work with the criminals in order to survive an attack on the precinct by a group of armed men.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In the year 2077, Jack Harper works as a security repairman on an Earth left empty and devastated after a war with aliens. Jack has two weeks left before his mission ends and he joins his fellow survivors on a faraway colony. However, Jack's concept of reality comes crashing down after he rescues a beautiful stranger from a downed spacecraft. The woman's arrival triggers a chain of events that culminates in Jack's nearly single-handed battle to save mankind.

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: A group of armed robbers fleeing the police head for the New Jersey Tunnel and run right into trucks transporting toxic waste. The spectacular explosion that follows results in both ends of the tunnel collapsing and the handful of people who survived the explosion are now in peril. Kit Latura is the only man with the skill and knowledge to lead the band of survivors out of the tunnel before the structure collapses.

programme.title: Sneakers
programme.desc: Computer hacker Martin (Robert Redford) heads a group of specialists who test the security of various San Francisco companies. Martin is approached by two National Security Agency officers who ask him to steal a newly invented decoder. Martin and his team discover that the black box can crack any encryption code, posing a huge threat if it lands in the wrong hands. When Martin realizes the NSA men who approached him are rogue agents, they frame him for the murder of the device's inventor.

programme.title: My Dad's Christmas Date
programme.desc: A 16-year-old tries to play matchmaker for her widowed father during Christmastime.

programme.title: Christmas Break-In
programme.desc: Christmas Break-In is the story of Izzy, a spunky nine year-old who gets left at school on the last day before Christmas break.

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: Crystal comes from a wealthy family and loves spending her parent's money. When they decide it's time for her to make something of her life they give her until Christmas to clean up her act.

programme.title: Santa Fake
programme.desc: Santa Fake is a musical comedy filled with Christmas spirit and holiday hijinks.

programme.title: Anna Nicole
programme.desc: Biopic of Anna Nicole Smith, Playmate and TV personality, culminates in a tragic fatal drug overdose.

programme.title: Wild Faith
programme.desc: A Civil War vet makes peace with his losses and starts a new life with the world resisting change around him.

programme.title: Sparks Over Brooklyn
programme.desc: Single mom and chef Lilah is at odds with tech innovator Charlie who buys her family restaurant.

programme.title: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A cop-turned-writer creates suspicion when she publishes her first novel.

programme.title: In Our Prime
programme.desc: One day, an outcast in a prestigious high school, meets the school's janitor who is a mathematical genius.

programme.title: The Distributors
programme.desc: Yoo-bin is led by his friend and spends a day at the club. Next day, a phone call was received from someone.

programme.title: What A Man Wants
programme.desc: A middle-aged womanizer pushes his strait-laced brother-in-law into having some fun but somehow ends up competing with him for the same girl.

programme.title: Fantasy
programme.desc: Chan-soo, in a vegetative state for 3 years, hears everything but remains trapped in time, unable to move.

programme.title: The Love We Had
programme.desc: One decision results in a tragedy that threatens to rip a young couple apart at the seams while essentially destroying everything and everyone who means the most to them.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: After Candace Maxwell survives an attempt on her life, former hitman, Quincy, signs up for the job as her bodyguard. His job is to protect her from double-crossing, dirty cop, Mike Rivers.

programme.title: Son of a Snake
programme.desc: A bishop who is a great leader of the congregation he serves, has the gift of saving souls, but lacks forgiveness. He carries a twenty year old secret that comes to light during a childhood reunion.

programme.title: Induced 2
programme.desc: After a harrowing event that nearly kills Claudia, she and her husband try their best to move on. Claudia and Marcus then hire a new mid-wife to assist as they prepare for their new child. But they don‚Äôt know that Erica is lurking in the shadows, and she wants that baby.

programme.title: Busted and Disgusted
programme.desc: Two sisters, Faith and Promise, overcome their difficult childhood following the death of their mother to cancer. Faith has it all, a successful career and a loving husband, but Promise feels threatened by her older sister‚Äôs success, and seeks to claim her happiness for herself.

programme.title: Miles Davis
programme.desc: American trumpeter Miles Davis (1926-1991) was a pioneering jazz musician from the late 1940s to the late 1980s. His influence on 20th century music is hard to overstate, as he trailblazed bebop, cool jazz, hardbop, modal jazz, and electronic music. On October 11, 1964, Miles Davis performed at Teatro Dell'Arte in Milan. With tenor saxophonist Wayne Shorter, pianist Herbie Hancock, bassist Ron Carter and drummer Tony Williams, Davis performed Autumn Leaves, My Funny Valentine, All Blues, All of You, and Joshua.

programme.title: Coleman Hawkins
programme.desc: A jazz festival named after the inventor of the instrument most associated with the genre, Adolphe Sax, would be incomplete without the man who laid the groundwork for how the instrument is played today. This must have been the reasoning of the organizers of the Festival International de Jazz Adolphe Sax in Dinant, Belgium, when they invited tenor saxophone giant Coleman Hawkins to perform there in June 1962. Appearing with a group that includes the French pianist George Arvanitas, one-time Duke Ellington bassist Jimmy Woode, and expat drummer Kansas Fields, the musician also known as ‘Bean' and ‘Hawk' serves up an hour-long set of familiar standards bookended by Hank Jones' “Chant” and J. J. Johnson's “Wee Dot”.

programme.title: Wes Montgomery, Pim Jacobs, Ruud Jacobs & Han Bennink
programme.sub-title: Guitarlegend Wes Montgomery in The Netherlands
programme.desc: Wes Montgomery: Live in '65 shines a light on one of the most unique and influential guitarists in music history. These beautifully filmed programs from the spring of 1965 feature Wes, in intimate studio settings, leading three different lineups through some of his best-known tunes, including “Four On Six”, “Jingles”, and “West Coast Blues”. This rare footage, featuring rehearsals, between-song banter, and closeup camera angles, illuminates Wes's extraordinary musical vocabulary and unconventional picking technique.

programme.title: Paul Desmond
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Modern Jazz Quartet
programme.desc: Formed in 1952 from the rhythm section of Dizzy Gillespie's big band, the Modern Jazz Quartet took its inspiration from classical chamber music as well as jazz's blues roots. The group enjoyed a decades-long career with multiple critically acclaimed albums, cementing their place in the history of the genre. Following concerts in Rotterdam and Amsterdam the days before, the Modern Jazz Quartet performed at Singer Concertzaal in Laren for Dutch TV on March 31, 1969. Composed of Milt Jackson on vibraphone, John Lewis on piano, Percy Heath on bass, and Connie Kay on drums, the foursome plays with elegance and style.

programme.title: Kenny Barron
programme.desc: Pianist Kenny Barron's June 27, 2019 appearance at the Alfa Jazz Festival in Ukraine's Lviv was a celebration of sublime jazz virtuosity. The revered elder statesmen of jazz piano brought his regular working trio of Kiyoshi Kitagawa (bass) and Jonathan Blake (drums), augmented by stellar jazzman Marcus Strickland (tenor saxophone) and young lion Riley Mulherkar (trumpet). Their seamless blend of classic bebop and modern explorations spoke of a deep, emotive connection to each note, captivating the Ukrainian audience with lyrical improvisations during this unforgettable concert.

programme.title: Freddie Hubbard, Al Grey, Alvin Batiste & Al Casey
programme.sub-title: Freddie Hubbard & The Satchmo Legacy Live in 1987
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. This concert of Freddie Hubbard and the Satchmo Legacy in 1987, highlights the bebop legend's classic style and silky tone. Hubbard is an American jazz trumpeter whose unmistakable and influential tone contributed to new perspectives for modern jazz and bebop. He was also a well-known part of Art Blakey and the Jazz Messengers and is primarily known for playing bebop, hard bop, and post-bop styles from the early '60s onwards.

programme.title: Astrud Gilberto, Marcelo Gilberto, David Sacks & Gil Goldstein
programme.sub-title: Astrud Gilberto Band Live at Estival Lugano 1985
programme.desc: Since 1977, Estival is a summer jazz festival in Switzerland, Lugano. Estival offers a thrilling and particularly surprising line-up that explores the rich world of contemporary music whilst promoting the understanding of different cultures, tolerance, and co-existence. “The Girl From Ipanema”, Astrud Gilberto's second name. The Brazilian bossa-nova and samba singer gives an outstanding, swinging performance at Estival Lugano. The band features Marcello Gilberto, David Sacks, Gil Goldstein, and Eduardo da Fonseca. Astrud started to record her own compositions in the '70s. She has recorded songs in Portuguese, English, Spanish, Italian, French, German, and Japanese.

programme.title: Martha Argerich, Evgeny Kissin, Iddo Bar-Shai & Arielle Beck
programme.sub-title: Martha Argerich – A Birthday Celebration - I
programme.desc: On the occasion of her 80th birthday, Argentinian pianist Martha Argerich explored chamber music repertoire in this wonderful concert, recorded at Château de Chantilly, France. The ‘Grande Dame' of the piano is joined by various renowned artists, including pianists Evgeny Kissin, Iddo Bar-Shaï, and Arielle Beck violinists Gidon Kremer, Maxim Vengerov, and Tedi Papavrami cellist Mischa Maisky, Flugelhorn player Sergei Nakariakov, as well as her daughter and grandson: Lyda Chen-Argerich (piano and viola) and David Chen-Argerich (piano). On the program are Alfred Schnittke's Congratulatory rondo for piano and violin Preludes No. 5, 21, and 24 from Mieczysław Weinberg's 24 Preludes, Op. 100 (arranged for solo violin by G. Kremer) ‘Waltz' and ‘Slava' from Sergei Rachmaninoff's 6 Morceaux, Op. 11, and Romance for six hands Fritz Kreisler's Liebesleid Robert Schumann's Fantasiestücke Op. 73, and Piano Quintet in E-flat major, Op. 44 and ‘Laideronnette, impératrice des Pagodes' from Maurice Ravel's Ma mère l'Oye. This performance was recorded on June 11, 2021.

programme.title: Tuva Semmingsen, Klaus Tönshoff, Danish National Symphony Orchestra & DR Big Band
programme.desc: Musicians of the Danish National Symphony Orchestra, the DR Big Band, and the Danish National Vocal Ensemble join forces under the baton of Klaus Tönshoff in this dazzling concert featuring great songs from black and white cinema. Norwegian mezzosoprano Tuva Semmingsen sings ‘Diamonds Are A Girl's Best Friend', from Gentlemen Prefer Blondes, ‘My Favorite Things' from The Sound of Music, ‘Over the Rainbow' from The Wizard of Oz, ‘Moon River' from Breakfast at Tiffany's, and many other unforgettable hits. This concert performance was recorded at the DR Koncerthuset in Copenhagen, Denmark, in June 2020.

programme.title: Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Maria Luigia Borsi & Antonio Artese
programme.sub-title: Vocal works by Puccini, Leoncavallo a. o.
programme.desc: The six-concert series “Io suono italiano” is dedicated to music of Italian composers and performed by Italian musicians on Italian instruments. The concert programs cover four centuries of music: from Girolamo Frescobaldi and Antonio Vivaldi to more contemporary music by Ennio Morricone and Azio Corghi. Each program presents more familiar pieces alongside lesser-known compositions. These performances were filmed at the atmospheric Teatro Sociale in Rovigo, Italy, in January 2021. In this program, Maria Luigia Borsi (soprano) and Antonio Artese (piano) present a recital consisting of several songs and arias. On the program are Francesco Paolo Tosti's Sogno, ‘A vucchella, and L'alba separa dalla luce l'ombra Giacomo Puccini's Sole e amore, Sogno d'or, “Donde lieta” (from La Bohème), “Il bel sogno di Doretta” (from La rondine), and “O mio babbino caro” (from Gianni Schicchi) Renato Brogi's Presentimento, Ruggero Leoncavallo's Mattinata, and Alfredo Catalini's Chanson Groenlandaise.

programme.title: Leonard Slatkin, Orchestre National de Lyon, Olga Kern & Sol Gabetta
programme.desc: American conductor Leonard Slatkin leads the Orchestre National de Lyon in a concert recorded at the Auditorium de Lyon in 2014. The concert opens with William Bolcom´s Circus Ouverture, which was specially composed for Slatkin's 70th birthday. The concert continues with a performance of Beethoven's Triple Concerto in C, Op. 56 performed by three female soloists: Olga Kern (piano), Baibe Skride (violin) and Sol Gabetta (cello). The work is the only concerto which Beethoven ever completed for more than one solo instrument. The concert closes with Ravel's beloved orchestration of Mussorgsky's Pictures at an Exhibition.

programme.title: Elena Bashkirova, Baiba Skride, Itamar Zorman & Krzysztof Chorzelski
programme.desc: During late summer every year, some of the world's best musicians meet in Israel for the Jerusalem International Chamber Music Festival (JCMF), established by pianist Elena Bashkirova and Yeheskell Beinisch. In 2016, the 19th festival was dedicated to the music of interrelated composers, such as Brahms and Schumann, and Schubert and Beethoven – performed by outstanding artists such as Sir András Schiff, Baiba Skride, Menahem Pressler and Emmanuel Pahud in the halls of the Jerusalem YMCA. This documentary film features excerpts from performances of the following works: Johannes Brahms's String Sextet no. 1, Op. 18 Franz Schubert's Arpeggione Sonata in A minor, D. 821 Antonín Dvořák's Piano Quintet no. 2 in A major, Op. 81 Ferruccio Busoni's Fantasia Contrappuntistica Felix Mendelssohn's Piano Trio no. 1, Op. 49 and Ludwig van Beethoven's Quintet for Piano and Winds, Op. 16.

programme.title: Eric Clapton & Steve Winwood
programme.desc: History rocked and rock made history during a sold-out three-gig stand at Madison Square Garden in late February 2008 when icons Eric Clapton and Steve Winwood performed a concert together for the first time since their all-too-brief days in the legendary Blind Faith in 1969. Whether they will ever team again is unknown. But with Eric Clapton and Steve Winwood Live From Madison Square Garden fans everywhere are able to experience the sound and the glory of a performance on that famous stage by two of rock's greatest artists.

programme.title: Pat Benatar
programme.desc: Pat Benatar was born on January 10, 1953, in Brooklyn, New York. After high school, she married her boyfriend and moved to Virginia. Unhappy with domestic life, the couple divorced, and Benatar moved back to New York. She worked the club scene and found her guitarist and future husband Neil Giraldo.

programme.title: The Pretenders
programme.desc: The Pretenders, originally three Englishmen and an American woman, emerged at the close of the '70s as one of the new wave's most commercially successful groups. Its focal point was Chrissie Hynde, the band's songwriter, lead singer, and rhythm guitarist, whose tough songs and stage persona put feminist self-assertion into her own distinctive hard rock. Leading music critics cast fresh light on the career of The Pretenders.

programme.title: El velo de novia
programme.desc: Después de descubrir una pintura perdida hace mucho tiempo, el curador del museo Avery y el nuevo miembro de la junta Peter investigan los orígenes de la obra de arte mientras planean una gala para revelarla. Protagonizada por Lacey Chabert, Kevin McGarry, Autumn Reeser y Alison Sweeney.

programme.title: Un romance de verano
programme.desc: El rancho de Samantha en Montana es el legado de su familia, por lo que cuando aparece un empresario para comprarlo, Sam no está interesada. Pero mientras él intenta ganarse la confianza de ella y el rancho, Sam descubre que él también podría estar ganando su corazón. Erin Krakow, Ryan Paevey.

programme.title: Navidad en Evergreen
programme.desc: Cuando cierran el aeropuerto por un temporal, una veterinaria se encuentra con un doctor y su hija. El resultado del encuentro les traerá a todos una Navidad mágica que jamás habrían soñado. Protagonizada por Ashley Williams y Teddy Sears.

programme.title: Un dueto navideño
programme.desc: Famoso por su amado dúo navideño, el destino reúne a la ex pareja musical, Averie y Jesse, durante las fiestas navideñas, justo a tiempo para el Festival anual de Navidad. Actúan Chaley Rose, Rome Flynn y Teryl Rothery.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Leaphorn, Chee y Manuelito descienden al escondite de la Sociedad Búfalo. Allá dentro, se enfrentan a unas duras decisiones que podrían cambiar el resto de sus vidas.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: El policía tribal navajo Joe Leaphorn investiga la muerte de un hombre involucrado en una misteriosa secta, mientras Jim Chee, pluriempleado como detective privado, trabaja en su propio caso.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Leaphorn profundiza en los vínculos personales que lo une a un caso cada vez más enigmático. El sargento Manuelito interroga a Chee, aunque se muestra reluctante a hacerlo. El hallazgo de un cadáver provoca que Leaphorn y Manuelito busquen a un niño.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Chee empieza a actuar por su propia cuenta tras el encuentro con un hombre peligroso. Leaphorn y Manuelito establecen una alianza con el sheriff del departamento, lo que le permite a Leaphorn encontrar una pista muy importante.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Leaphorn pone en peligro su vida durante la persecución de un sospechoso. Manuelito desafía al sheriff con la intención de rescatar a su jefe. Chee reflexiona sobre una propuesta peligrosa que le ofrecerá respuestas sobre el caso.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Leaphorn trabaja a contrarreloj para obtener una confesión de un sospechoso antes de que deje de estar bajo su custodia. Mientras tanto, Chee se introduce de incógnito en la secta que vincula sus distintas investigaciones.

programme.title: Dark Winds
programme.desc: Leaphorn y Chee encuentran evidencias que vinculan sus casos, pero traen consigo una amarga verdad: será difícil que se haga justicia. Entretanto, Manuelito se prepara para un gran cambio en su vida.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Sara y Berta pelean en un canje de rehenes y, cuando creen tener el control, se disparan las alarmas. Mario lanza su sistema de distribución con drones. Salvador va a Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Señora Acero
programme.desc: Salvador entra al túnel, pero lo que no sabe es que el Teca sigue sus pasos y podría ser usado como carnada para dar con su madre. Dóriga le confiesa su amor a Sara. La Tuti consuela a otro hombre.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.desc: Harta de los maltratos de Kyle, Isabel corre a los brazos de Nacho y ambos dejan Canadá para ir a Nueva York. No miden las consecuencias de una guerra que va mas allá de la infidelidad.

programme.title: El Barón
programme.sub-title: Nacho en el blanco con Kyle
programme.desc: El rey de Toronto busca a Nacho para matarlo, pero cuando la DEA interviene en una disco de Manhattan, el destino juega en su contra. Está dispuesto a hablar, pero a cambio de algún beneficio.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Luego de un enfrentamiento en el hospital, rodean a Leonor y Ramos, quienes tienen que dejar escapar a Heriberto. Para probar su lealtad al Chema, Ernesto mata a uno de los hombres de Chacorta.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Heriberto y Leonor se enfrentan por última vez. Él descubre la emboscada, pero no puede escapar de su suerte. Moribundo, asegura que ella se ha convertido en lo que tanto combatió, una asesina.

programme.title: El señor de los cielos
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de Heriberto, Aurelio declara la guerra para vengarlo: tiene ganas de matar a medio mundo. Todos se preparan para lo peor. Victoria le pone más protección a Leonor.

programme.title: La patrona: Un conmovedor encuentro
programme.desc: Alejandro besa a Verónica y le confiesa que lo hace para recordar a Gabriela. La señora Dantés se encuentra a David en el cementerio y escucha todo el amor que él profesa por su abuelo.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Isabel cae en la tentación con Renzo y durante su encuentro hablan de Ángela, quien los ve haciendo el amor. La mujer de Juan Marcos rechaza a Diego y su esposo escucha todo.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.sub-title: El complot de Isabel y Renzo
programme.desc: Isabel le miente a Juan Marcos diciéndole que vio a Ángela en la cama con Renzo, quiere que ambos sean despedidos de inmediato. Juan Marcos, confundido, decide darles otra oportunidad.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Isabel y Renzo le tienden una trampa a Ángela, él la obliga a tener relaciones para que Juan Marcos los vea, pero por causalidad, él escucha una conversación y se entera de toda la verdad.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Isabel amenaza con suicidarse y acepta la supuesta ayuda de Fernanda. Vicente quiere a Fernanda con él y para lograrlo, trata de convencer a Bernardo sobre la necesidad de matar a Juan Marcos.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Fernanda asesina a Isabel. Juan Marcos y Ángela se enfrentan a tiros con unos hombres, en medio de la situación aprovechan para confesarse su amor.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Juan Marcos se siente responsable por la muerte de Isabel. Willy no soporta pensar que Sam y su padre son amantes. Fernanda está como loca al enterarse de que Vicente trató de matar a Juan Marcos. Ángela dice a Juan Marcos que debe irse de la casa.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Juan Marcos despide a Ángela para protegerla y Estela duda de esa decisión. Emma y Gabriel se besan mientras Pablo los ve. Samantha le reconoce a Willy que Perla es la verdadera amante de su padre.

programme.title: Corazón valiente
programme.desc: Las vidas de Samantha y Ángela quedaron marcadas después del secuestro que sufrió Sam cuando era una niña, ahora ambas están dedicadas a proteger a otros. Juan Marcos conoce a Ángela y hay química entre ellos.

programme.title: Teresa

programme.title: Teresa

programme.title: A Killer's Mistake
programme.desc: It was a public holiday in Britain as the nation celebrated a Royal Wedding...the same day, things had all got too much for Anxiang Du. He had set up a Chinese Herbal medicine business with a fellow Chinese national, but things had turned sour. Years of litigation ended one fateful day in defeat for Du in a case against his Commercial partner 'Jeff' Ding. Du's decision to leave a note suggesting he was to commit suicide alerted his wife who, in turn, told Police. Already looking for him, Police are alerted to the slaughter of a Chinese family...Mr and Mrs Ding and their two daughters - was Du the killer?

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The pink city hosts a coffer full of world-famous food treasures. The Victor Hugo Market has black truffles of Quercy, Rocamadour cheese, foie gras, and white beans of the most traditional Cassoulet on sale. And Michelin-starred chef Michel Sarràn gives us his tips on what the belly of Toulouse really is. (S2 E04)

programme.title: Exploring Europe's Great Food Markets
programme.desc: The old ladies selling their baskets full of vegetables and cheese on the Dolac market in Zagreb bring us back in time. At the market, we go from the breathtaking Mediterranean islands to the Austrian Alps, from freshly caught hake and simple Baltic snacks to internationally awarded cheese and a unique Turkey breed. (S2 E05)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia heads to South Carolina to meet the many talented artisans that define Lowcountry. From a basket weaver who is keeping the sweetgrass tradition of the Gullah Geechee people alive, to an intercoastal inspired shrimp recipe served in ironware crafted right down the street. Find out why the Lowcountry is defined by its character as much as it is a spot on the map. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia brings us into her garden and teaches us about small space gardening, container gardening, and how to make the most of the land around you, no matter your constraints. Along the way she talks with community leaders on what it takes to compost and start a community garden. Georgia also takes us back to her kitchen to share some of her favorite garden recipes. (S1 E02)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Georgia travels to a festival in the Ozarks where she is teaching a cooking class. We follow her as she prepares and gathers her ingredients — we meet a small town chicken farmer, gather produce at the local farmers market, and set the table at a local textile studio where Georgia learns to dye napkins. (S1 E03)

programme.title: Modern Pioneering with Georgia Pellegrini
programme.desc: Join Georgia on an urban foraging expedition and learn from an edible and medicinal plants expert as he and Georgia collect a variety of items during a walk through the neighborhood. From flower studded ice cubes, to honeysuckle tea, to dandelion green salad, Georgia is making the most of what is around her. (S1 E04)

programme.title: The Irish Pub
programme.desc: The Irish Pub is a eulogy to the greatest institution in Irish society, the pub or more specifically the traditional Irish publicans who run them. The characters in this exceptionally endearing film all run and own pubs that have been in their families for generations and it is through their warmth, wit and wisdom that we gain an insight into the heart and soul of The Irish Pub.

programme.title: Blow-Ins

programme.title: Lost Kingdoms of South America
programme.desc: Deep in the Bolivian Andes at the breathtaking height of 13000ft stands Tiwanaku, the awe inspiring ruins of a monolithic temple city. Built by a civilisation who dominated a vast swathe of South America, it was abandoned 1000 years ago. For centuries it has been a mystery: how did a civilisation flourish at such an altitude and why did they vanish? Archaeologist Dr Jago Cooper journeys through Bolivia's spectacular landscape to investigate the origins of Tiwanaku and finds evidence of an ancient people with amazing understanding of their environment whose religion was based on collective effort and ritual beer drinking.

programme.title: Burning Up
programme.desc: Lou's new business relationship with Matt starts to unravel when a botched job puts a serious strain on the company.

programme.title: Pyramid Scams and Princesses
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Matt wrangle with two belligerent truckers who will stop at nothing to protect their massive tractor-trailer. Next, a young girl learns that she's been a victim of a pyramid scam when Lyndah and Lou come for her car. Finally, Matt, Sonia, and Lyndah enjoy a little nightlife when they hit the club to take down an entitled princess who's high on charm, but late on her payments. But the debtor's not the only one who fights to get the car.

programme.title: Adult Film Star
programme.desc: First, Lou, Froy, and Matt press charges after a violent debtor attacks the crew. Later, Lou, Sonia, and Froy head out to the boondocks to repo a BMW in the middle of an adult film shoot. And finally, Sonia and Lyndah ride out in Sonia's car to meet up with the debtor's sister-in-law who helps the team find the debtor's car.

programme.title: The Big Letdown
programme.desc: Froy meets with a lawyer, but his legal troubles are worse than expected. Sonia and Froy confront a debtor who uses a homeless man in his ploy to keep his car. Then, Sonia and Froy discover one debtor's alcoholism is only a farce to cover a bigger secret. And finally, the team's attempt to repo fifteen bikes from a gym is not the morale booster Lou had hoped for.

programme.title: Reading, Painting, and Physical Education
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia try to repossess a high-end Corvette from a high-strung librarian. Then, it's some serious sibling rivalry when Matt and Froy come to take a van away from a pair of housepainter brothers. Finally, Lou and Matt get knocked for a loop by a sub-professional baseball team who don't want to lose their bus.

programme.title: I Don't Know What That Is
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy crash a raucous brew-fest to sneak an ATV away from a crowd of tipsy revelers. Then, Matt and Lou come face-to-face with a fraternity prank gone awry - these college kids have a sledgehammer, and they're not afraid to use it. And finally, Lou, Lyndah, and Sonia take on the task of repossessing a Corolla from a woman with a bun in the oven and an axe to grind.

programme.title: Highway To Be Anger-Prone
programme.desc: Froy and Sonia are overwhelmed by a swarm of cheerleaders Matt and Froy interrupt a father and son bonding session gone wrong the team heads to the raceway to prove they still have what it takes.

programme.title: Smart and Stupids
programme.desc: Lou and Froy repo a vehicle in a bad part of town and somebody gets punched in the face. Then, Sonia and Lyndah interrupt a tennis match to retrieve an automobile. Plus, Matt and Froy confront an out-of-control director in the middle of a shoot.

programme.title: Vampires and Drunks
programme.desc: First, Froy and Sonia take a trip to Beverly Hills to interrupt the salon appointment of a wealthy trophy wife who isn't going to let her prized possession go without a fight. Then, Sonia and Matt use the cover of night to sneak away a Nissan. Too bad the owner is throwing a party with his neck-biting, vampire-wannabe friends. And finally, Matt and Froy face the fury of a clan of drunken relatives when they interrupt a raucous family reunion.

programme.title: Cement Mixer
programme.desc: Down in Texas, Matt and Froy are staking out a cement mixer, but their repo turns disastrous when an innocent bystander gets showered in concrete. In LA, Frankie takes the reins with an alcoholic debtor, and Lou and Sonia deal with a diva who pushes Sonia to her breaking point.

programme.title: The Car That Rolled Away
programme.desc: Lou and Lyndah try to negotiate a set of keys away from a raucous group of drunken outdoorsmen. Then, Froy and Lyndah repo a vehicle from a unruly and untalented guitarist. Plus, Froy and Sonia bite off more than they can chew when they try to reclaim an SUV from a confused and embittered former football player.

programme.title: The Crush
programme.desc: Lou faces the toughest loss of his career. First, the team repossesses a truck from a pair of larger-than-life debtors with a passion for exotic sports, then they grapple with a gaggle of drunken partiers who don't want to give up their tricked-out bus, and, Lou and Matt track a debtor to a junkyard.

programme.title: Little Froy's Big Mistake
programme.desc: Matt and Froy take on a grungy fisherman, but when he isn't afraid to damage his own boat, Froy is the one who is sinking fast.

programme.title: Daddy's Little Girl
programme.desc: The destruction of the repo team's truck has left the future of the company in the balance, but Matt's got a trick up his sleeve that might keep them afloat. Lou and Sonia head to a dark alley to take a van away from a pair of libidinous teens with a dark secret, Sonia and Froy come face to face with the world's most ornery baker and come away a little worse for wear, and Matt and Froy get in way over their heads when they attempt a repo at a high-octane truck racing track.

programme.title: Eat Flowers
programme.desc: Eat Flowers picks up in 2017 as photographer Cig Harvey's best friend Mary is diagnosed with a rare form of leukemia. When forced to isolate during her treatment, she asks Cig to send her photographs. Everyday Cig sets out to bring color and life to Mary through her camera. Everyday Mary asks for more. ‘Eat Flowers' brings us into the vibrant worlds that Cig creates for her. Directed by River Finlay

programme.title: Abundance

programme.title: The Undocumented Lawyer

programme.title: Apolonia, Apolonia

programme.title: The Heartbeat Of Life
programme.desc: In the sunlit hills of Sicily, artisan Francesco transforms goatskin into tambourines, each drum a reincarnation of life's rhythm. Through his soulful craft, he gives voice to the cycle of life and death, calling his creations his children before releasing them into the world. Joined by Peppe, a passionate percussionist devoted to preserving Sicily's ancestral beat, they weave a timeless narrative of tradition, connection, and the enduring heartbeat of the drum across generations. Directed by Guisseppe Malpasso.

programme.title: Understory
programme.desc: “School of Fish” offers an intimate portrait inside one family's seasonal salmon rituals and their connection to the Bristol Bay Fly Fishing and Guide Academy, where local youth are empowered through fly fishing to serve as guides and conservationists.
